{{Infobox location
| name = Grandmasters’ palace
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] insisted [[Simon]] be given rooms in the [[Grandmasters’ palace]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters’ palace]] contains the [[Naraka]] quarters.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters’ palace]] is located in [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
